body.title: Fix: OpenRouterSource.call() drops req.tools — never forwarded to OR API
body.done_note: Shipped in e543554d alongside T-flat-rate-provider-routing; 2 tests in test_flat_rate_routing.py
body.description:
OpenRouterSource.call() built the payload without req.tools, so tool definitions were silently dropped before reaching the OR API. DickSimnel ToolLoop passed tools via InferenceRequest.tools but OR never received them — models couldn't call tools, producing planning-text results (fake-DONE pattern). Fix: add `if req.tools: payload["tools"] = req.tools` in OpenRouterSource.call() and OllamaCloudSource.call(). Tests added in test_flat_rate_routing.py.

**Affected files:** devices/inference/sources.py
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** tools forwarding in OpenRouterSource and OllamaCloudSource only
**Completion criteria:** test_openrouter_forwards_tools_to_api and test_openrouter_no_tools_field_when_tools_none pass
